ogTitle: Lake Eppalock vs Lake Gardens: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Eppalock and Lake Gardens.
heading: Lake Eppalock vs Lake Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Eppalock, Victoria and Lake Gardens, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Lake Eppalock (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Eppalock or Lake Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Eppalock has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Lake Gardens scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Eppalock scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Gardens scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Eppalock or Lake Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Gardens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
